# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Http;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Config;
use RuntimeException;

class TwilioSmsService
{
    protected string $accountSid;
    protected string $authToken;
    protected string $fromNumber;
    protected string $baseUrl;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = (string) config('services.twilio.sid', env('TWILIO_SID'));
        $this->authToken = (string) config('services.twilio.token', env('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'));
        $this->fromNumber = (string) config('services.twilio.from', env('TWILIO_FROM'));
        $this->baseUrl = 'https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/' . $this->accountSid;

        $this->validateConfiguration();
    }

    public function send(string $to, string $message): array
    {
        $response = Http::asForm()
            ->withBasicAuth($this->accountSid, $this->authToken)
            ->post($this->baseUrl . '/Messages.json', [
                'From' => $this->fromNumber,
                'To' => $to,
                'Body' => $message,
            ]);

        if ($response->failed()) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Twilio SMS sending failed: ' . $response->body());
        }

        return $response->json();
    }

    protected function validateConfiguration(): void
    {
        if (empty($this->accountSid) || empty($this->authToken) || empty($this->fromNumber)) {
            throw new RuntimeException('Twilio configuration is missing. Please set services.twilio.sid, services.twilio.token, and services.twilio.from.');
        }
    }
}
